chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 833 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3680/2025 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 24.06.2025 Mr. Mehtab Ahmed Shar along with petitioners. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional P.G along with SIP Muhammad Sadique, Investigating Officer of P.S Faziganj..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Addl.A.G Sindh has filed statement on behalf of S.S.P Khairpur Mir’s, taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 02.06.2025 respondent No.4 (SIP Muhammad Sadique, Investigating Officer of Crime No.88 of 2025 registered at Police Station Faizganj under Sections 365-B PPC is present, files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Dilshad (Petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC, and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Zulifqar Ali (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her father (Respondent No.5) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Page 2 of 2 Counsel for petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed.
